/usr/bin/ar qc "TestSynthPlugin_artefacts/Release/libTest Synth Plugin_SharedCode.a" CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/test_synth/SynthProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/test_synth/SynthEditor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors/juce_audio_processors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_gui_extra/juce_gui_extra.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_gui_basics/juce_gui_basics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Harfbuzz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Sheenbidi.c.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_events/juce_events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core_CompilationTime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_data_structures/juce_data_structures.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors_headless/juce_audio_processors_headless.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors_headless/juce_audio_processors_headless_ara.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors_headless/juce_audio_processors_headless_lv2_libs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_basics/juce_audio_basics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_utils/juce_audio_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_formats/juce_audio_formats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_devices/juce_audio_devices.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestSynthPlugin.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_dsp/juce_dsp.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib "TestSynthPlugin_artefacts/Release/libTest Synth Plugin_SharedCode.a"
